# Json Ai MCP

> json-ai-mcp MCP — AI-powered automation tool

`json-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install json-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx json-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `validate_json` — Validate JSON and report structure details.
- `transform_json` — Transform JSON. Operations: sort_keys, minify, prettify, remove_nulls, add_field, remove_field, get_path.
- `diff_json` — Compare two JSON objects and find differences.
- `flatten_json` — Flatten nested JSON to single-level with dot-notation keys.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/json-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/json-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
